title: Fermented Spanish Tomato Stir-fry
description: This fermented dish combines the tangy flavor of Spanish tomatoes with a spicy kick from garam masala to create a high-protein-friendly hangover-cure treat, perfect for breakfast.
instructions: Soak the fermented Spanish tomatoes in water for about 10 minutes to soften them.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and onions; sauté until translucent, approximately 3-5 minutes.
Stir in garam masala and continue cooking for another minute, stirring constantly to avoid burning the spices.
Add the soaked fermented Spanish tomatoes into the pan. Cook for about 2-3 more minutes, allowing them to release their juices.
Pour in turkey or chicken broth. Stir well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
Simmer gently on low heat until thickened slightly, about 5-7 minutes.
